document.heading: Approval of Amended Articles and Operating Agreement for UMIT Technologies, LLC
document.text: A Resolution approving and adopting the amended Articles of Organization and amended and restated Operating Agreement for Upper Mattaponi Tribe Indian Technologies, LLC.
At a duly called General Meeting of the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council held this 28th day of February, 2026, the following Resolution and Law were adopted.

recital.text: the Upper Mattaponi Tribe ("Tribe") is an Indian Tribe that has existed from time immemorial and is federally recognized on a government-to-government basis by the United States of America under Section 303(a)(1) of the Thomasina E. Jordon Indian Tribes of Virginia Federal Recognition Act of 2017, Public Law No. 115-121 (January 29, 2018) ("Recognition Act"); and

pursuant to Article VII of the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe ("Constitution"), the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council ("Council") is vested with the legislative power of the Tribe and has the authority to enact laws pursuant to Article VII, Section 4(a) of the Constitution; and
Upper Mattaponi Indian Tribe Technologies, LLC, was formed as a wholly owned company of the Tribe through adoption of Resolution 2024-08 on June 22, 2024; and

Upper Mattaponi Indian Tribe Technologies, LLC, has acquired several contracts and is showing significant progress and potential as part of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe's on-going economic development goals; and

15 U.S.C. §§ 636(j)(10) and 637(a) authorizes the United States Small Business Administration to establish a business development program, commonly known as the 8(a) Business Development program. Businesses, including tribal businesses, that participate in the program receive training and technical assistance designed to strengthen their ability to compete effectively in the American economy; and

Upper Mattaponi Indian Tribe Technologies, LLC, has indicated its desire to participate in the Small Business Administration's 8(a) Business Development program and requested the Tribe's support in this endeavor; and

Upper Mattaponi Indian Tribe Technologies, LLC, wishes to amend its Articles of Organization and Operating Agreement to provide, among other things, new provisions necessary to participate in the Small Business Administration's 8(a) Business Development program; and

the Amended Articles of Organization and Amended and Restated Operating Agreement contain a provision waiving the sovereign immunity of Upper Mattaponi Indian Tribe Technologies, LLC, and said waivers are specific to participation in the Small Business Administration's 8(a) Business Development program, and limited to the assets of the company.
that the Upper Mattaponi Tribe hereby approves and adopts the attached Amended Articles of Organization (Exhibit A) and Amended and Restated Operating Agreement (Exhibit B); and

recital.conjunction: NOW THEREFORE BE IT FURTHER RESOLVED,
recital.text: that the Chief of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe, W. Frank Adams, is authorized to execute, on behalf of the Tribe, the attached Amended Articles of Organization (Exhibit A) and Amended and Restated Operating Agreement (Exhibit B).

procedural-data.text: The foregoing Resolution was duly voted upon by the Council on the 28th day of February, 2026, at a General Meeting with a vote of 7 in favor and 0 opposed, 0 abstaining, and 0 absent, pursuant to the authority vested in the Council by the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe.
